title: Commissioned to Missions
description: Daniel & Mirtha were commended by their sending church and MSC Canada to serve as missionaries.

title: Arrival in Peru
description: Settled in Ayacucho and began building relationships with local churches and community leaders.

title: Highland Expansion
description: Extended ministry to Andean villages — launching outreach circuits and fellowship groups.

title: Youth Program Launch
description: Established sports and discipleship programs reaching young people across multiple neighborhoods.

title: Flood Relief Response
description: Coordinated emergency aid and pastoral care for families affected by severe seasonal flooding.

title: Transition & Ongoing Partnership
description: Returned to Canada while maintaining close partnership with Peruvian leaders who continue the work.

title: Return to Peru
description: Preparing to return to the field — pray for provision, health, and open doors for ministry.
